name: Lettuce and Onion Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the bacon grease, vinegar, and sugar in a saucepan over medium heat until boiling.
2. Pour the mixture evenly over the shredded lettuce and chopped green onions.
3. Add salt and pepper to taste.
4. Toss gently to combine all ingredients.
5. Serve immediately.
